reviews.comment:
En realidad es el Automóvil Club Argentino. Atención muy buena. Mi única crítica es que la última vez que estuve ,el estacionamiento del A C.A es más caro que el de mi ciudad, debería tener el mismo costó toda vez al ser socio no debería variar el costo.

(Translated by Google)
It's actually the Argentine Automobile Club. Service is very good. My only criticism is that the last time I was there, the parking at the A.C.A. was more expensive than the one in my city. It should be the same price; since being a member shouldn't change the cost.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwNllUNkZBEAE
